- name: Deploy Nginx via SSM (Clean Version)
    run: |
        COMMAND=$(cat <<EOF
        sudo apt update -y
        sudo apt install -y nginx
        sudo tee /var/www/html/index.html <<HTML
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html>
        <body>
        <h1>Hello From Ubuntu EC2 Instance!!!</h1>
        <p>Setup by Terraform and GitHub Actions.</p>
        </body>
        </html>
        HTML
        sudo systemctl restart nginx
        EOF
        )

        aws ssm send-command \
        --instance-ids "${{ needs.fetch_aws_ec2_instance_id.outputs.EC2_INSTANCE_ID }}" \
        --document-name "AWS-RunShellScript" \
        --parameters "commands=[$COMMAND]" \
        --region ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}
